properties.description: Detects users assigning themselves admin roles, new role assignments outside business hours (before 08:00 or after 20:00 EST), or bulk role assignments (5+ in 10 minutes). Mapped to MITRE ATT&CK T1078 - Valid Accounts and T1098 - Account Manipulation.
properties.query:
AuditLogs
| where TimeGenerated >= ago(1h)
| where OperationName has_any ("Add member to role", "Add eligible member to role", "Add owner to group", "Add user", "Update role")
| extend
    InitiatedByUPN  = tostring(InitiatedBy.user.userPrincipalName),
    TargetUPN       = tostring(TargetResources[0].userPrincipalName),
    RoleName        = tostring(TargetResources[0].displayName),
    TargetId        = tostring(TargetResources[0].id),
    ResultReason    = tostring(AdditionalDetails[0].value),
    HourOfDay       = datetime_part('hour', TimeGenerated)
| where isnotempty(InitiatedByUPN)
| extend
    SelfAssignment   = iff(InitiatedByUPN == TargetUPN, true, false),
    OutsideHours     = iff(HourOfDay < 8 or HourOfDay >= 20, true, false),
    IsAdminRole      = iff(RoleName has_any ("Global Administrator","Privileged Role Administrator","Security Administrator","User Access Administrator"), true, false)
| summarize
    TotalAssignments = count(),
    SelfAssigned     = countif(SelfAssignment == true),
    OutsideHoursCount = countif(OutsideHours == true),
    AdminRoleCount   = countif(IsAdminRole == true),
    Roles            = make_set(RoleName),
    Targets          = make_set(TargetUPN),
    FirstSeen        = min(TimeGenerated),
    LastSeen         = max(TimeGenerated)
    by InitiatedByUPN, bin(TimeGenerated, 10m)
| where SelfAssigned > 0 or OutsideHoursCount > 0 or TotalAssignments >= 5 or AdminRoleCount > 0
| extend
    AlertReason = case(
        SelfAssigned > 0,      "Self role assignment detected",
        TotalAssignments >= 5, "Bulk role assignments (" + tostring(TotalAssignments) + " in 10 min)",
        OutsideHoursCount > 0, "Role assignment outside business hours",
        AdminRoleCount > 0,    "Privileged admin role assigned",
        "Role escalation activity"
    )
| project TimeGenerated, InitiatedByUPN, Targets, Roles, TotalAssignments, AlertReason, SelfAssigned, OutsideHoursCount
